description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Heel: 2"Product DetailsTapering toed sandal with braided straps across the midfoot A wide strap from the toe to the ankle with a buckled ankle loop strapLightly padded beige footbed with a heel patchMini heel with a plastic heel patchTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
